title: 03 Ist
zine-seo-title: 03 Ist - A Winter in Istanbul Through Street Photography by Luc Rousseau
zine-seo-description: Discover '03 Ist,' a photographic journey through Istanbul by Luc Rousseau during his three-month stay in late 2023. Experience the city's unique atmosphere through street photography, featuring moments captured along the Bosphorus, ferry crossings, and daily life in Turkey's largest city.
content:
03 Ist

From October 2023 to the end of January 2024, we stayed in Istanbul, Turkey. We spent three fairly quiet months there, like a break before our upcoming vacation in Egypt. When traveling full-time, it's also good to take some stays in slow travel mode—not rushing everywhere to see everything—because, as fantastic as this lifestyle may be, the pace can become exhausting.

I particularly enjoyed the ferries on the Bosphorus. Whenever I had the chance, I would take a round trip between the two shores.
